Professional Websites
Starting ₹3,999.

Get a fully responsive, SEO-ready, and mobile-optimized website for your small business or startup — delivered in just 3–7 working days. No hidden charges, no technical headaches.

The Digital Necessity

Why Every Small Business
Needs a Website in 2025.

  • Online visibility 24/7, 365 days

    97% of consumers search online before buying. Be discoverable round the clock, even while you sleep.

  • Builds instant trust & credibility

    A professional website signals legitimacy. Customers trust businesses with an online presence 3x more.

  • Generates and captures leads automatically

    Built-in contact forms and WhatsApp chat turn visitors into paying customers on autopilot.

  • Showcases your products & services professionally

    Present your offerings in the best light with a clean, modern design that converts browsers into buyers.

  • Affordable entry into digital growth

    Start your digital journey without breaking the bank. Scale up anytime as your business grows.

Premium Website Development | Preet Tech

Looking for a fast, responsive, and affordable website? Our eco-budget plans offer premium designs to get you online in just 7 days.

INDEXED
Built for Google Rankings

SEO-Ready Website
Structure Included.

Every eco website we build is engineered to rank on Google from day one — no costly SEO agency needed to get started.

01

SEO Meta Tags & Title Optimization

Carefully crafted title tags, meta descriptions, and heading structures for every page to target the right keywords.

02

Google Search Console & Sitemap Submission

We submit your sitemap directly to Google Search Console for rapid crawling and faster indexing.

03

Mobile-First Design (Google's Priority)

Google uses mobile-first indexing. Every eco website is pixel-perfect on smartphones, tablets, and desktops.

04

SSL Certificate & HTTPS Security

SSL-secured HTTPS connection included — a confirmed Google ranking signal that also builds visitor trust.

Fastest Website Launch in India

From Brief to Live Website
in Just 3–7 Days

Our streamlined 4-phase process eliminates delays. You fill in the brief — we handle everything else until your website is live on the internet.

Day 1

Briefing

Form submission & brief discussion

Day 2-4

Development

Core build & initial optimization

Day 5-6

Refinements

Perfecting content & final polish

Day 7

Go-Live

How It Works

Simple 4-Step Process

01

Consultation

We discuss your brand identity and set precise goals.

02

Design

Crafting a beautiful and high-converting modern layout.

03

Development

Building your website fast, responsive, and secure.

04

Launch

Review the final product, easily deploy, and go live!

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions About Our Eco Website Plan

Everything you need to know before launching your business website with Preet Tech.

Typically 3–7 working days from the date we receive your content and brief. Our streamlined process means most clients are live within a week — often faster. The exact timeline depends on how quickly feedback and content are shared.

Domain registration cost is separate (typically ₹800–₹1,500/year for a .com domain), but we handle the entire setup process for you. We guide you through domain purchase and connect it to your website completely free of charge.

Absolutely! Your eco website is built on a scalable foundation. You can upgrade to our advanced website plans — including e-commerce, custom animations, or CMS integration — at any time without starting from scratch.

Yes! We offer post-launch support to fix any issues that arise after going live. We also offer optional monthly maintenance plans for ongoing updates, security patches, and performance monitoring.

We include one comprehensive revision round during the design phase where you can request changes to layout, colors, content, and structure. Additional revision rounds can be added as a paid upgrade if needed.

Your eco website is built with on-page SEO best practices — optimized meta tags, heading structure, mobile-first design, fast load times, and sitemap submission to Google Search Console. While rankings depend on your niche and competition, you'll have a solid SEO foundation from day one.

Launch Your Business Website
in 3–7 Days for ₹3,999
